description: Livewire V2 to V3 migration rules

hop-8-to-9.notes: No breaking changes in Livewire between Laravel 8 and 9 hops

hop-9-to-10.notes: Livewire V3 released with Laravel 10. emit() renamed to dispatch(), getXxxProperty() to #[Computed]

hop-10-to-11.notes: Livewire V4 supports Laravel 10-13 with full-stack reactive components

hop-11-to-12.notes: No further Livewire breaking changes between Laravel 11 and 12

hop-12-to-13.notes: No Livewire breaking changes between Laravel 12 and 13
